content.text: Good, cluster is fresh — Phase 1 baseline with 5 workers already matches. Now I'll monitor the traffic-generator logs to track phase transitions.

content.content:
PHASE 1: baseline load (5 workers sufficient) - 60s
LAG=2000 LATENCY=50ms

tool_use_result.stdout:
PHASE 1: baseline load (5 workers sufficient) - 60s
LAG=2000 LATENCY=50ms

content.text: I'll write a monitoring script that follows the traffic-generator logs and scales the worker deployment in real time as phases change, running it as a single blocking command for the full duration.

input.command:
timeout 360 kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator -f --tail=100 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r line; do
  echo "$line"
  if echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 2, scaling spark-worker to 10"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 3, scaling spark-worker to 20"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=20
  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 4, scaling spark-worker to 5"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=5
  fi
done
echo "=== Monitoring loop ended ==="

    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then

  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then

  echo "$line"
  if echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 2, scaling spark-worker to 10"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 3, scaling spark-worker to 20"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=20
  elif echo "$line" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo ">>> Detected PHASE 4, scaling spark-worker to 5"
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=5
  fi
done
echo "=== Monitoring loop ended ==="

deployment.apps/spark-worker scaled

deployment.apps/spark-worker scaled

deployment.apps/spark-worker scaled
LAG=1500 LATENCY=45ms

Terminated
=== Monitoring loop ended ===
